messages.content: You must return JSON only. ALL fields in the schema must be present, even if null or empty.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

persona.time_onsocialmedia: You spend roughly a few times weekly on social media

response_parsed.opinion: As a carpenter and student living in New York, I have come to realize the importance of being cautious when consuming information on social media. With my high openness score, I tend to be more receptive to new ideas, but this also makes me more susceptible to falling for fake content. To manage and deal with fake content, I believe it's essential to verify information through reputable sources before accepting it as true. My agreeableness trait helps me to be more empathetic towards others, which is crucial in understanding the potential motivations behind fake content. However, my low conscientiousness score can sometimes make it challenging for me to be diligent in fact-checking. To combat this, I try to set aside dedicated time to evaluate the information I come across on social media. My experience as an immigrant has also taught me to be more critical of information, especially when it comes to sensitive topics like politics and social issues. By being more mindful of my own biases and taking the time to verify information, I believe I can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media. Moreover, my hobbies such as reading novels have helped me develop critical thinking skills, which are essential in identifying fake content. Overall, it's crucial to approach social media with a healthy dose of skepticism and to prioritize fact-checking to avoid falling victim to misinformation.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: The persona's high openness score makes them more receptive to new ideas, but also more susceptible to fake content. Their agreeableness trait helps them understand the motivations behind fake content, while their low conscientiousness score can make it challenging to be diligent in fact-checking. The persona's experience as an immigrant and their hobbies such as reading novels have taught them to be critical of information and develop critical thinking skills. By being more mindful of their own biases and taking the time to verify information, they can effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media.
